name: Essay Studio
description: Essays and newsletters: drafts held to your own style guide

actions.label: Sharpen this argument
actions.prompt: This passage is making an argument. Point out the weakest link in it, then rewrite the passage to fix it. Keep my voice.

actions.label: Hunt weasel words
actions.prompt: Find hedges and weasel words in this draft (somewhat, arguably, very, quite, I think). Either cut them or replace them with a concrete claim. Edit the document directly.
